ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tables_info" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "relname" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the table structure */,
  "tree_level" INTEGER /* Tree level of the index */,
  "index_size" TEXT /* Size of the index in bytes */,
  "root_block_no" INTEGER /* Root block number of the index */,
  "internal_pages" INTEGER /* Number of internal pages */,
  "leaf_pages" INTEGER /* Number of leaf pages */,
  "empty_pages" INTEGER /* Number of empty pages */,
  "deleted_pages" INTEGER /* Number of deleted pages */,
  "avg_leaf_density" REAL /* Average density of the leaf pages */,
  "leaf_fragmentation" REAL /* Fragmentation percentage of the leaf pages */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data in the table in bytes */,
  "row_count" TEXT /* Number of rows in the table */,
  "data_density" REAL /* Average density of the data pages */,
  "data_fragmentation" REAL /* Fragmentation percentage of the data pages */,
  "last_analyzed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last analysis of the table */,
  "last_vacuumed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last vacuum operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_info" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the table the index belongs to */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., B-tree, Hash) */,
  "is_unique" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the index is unique or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_analyzed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last analysis of the index */,
  "last_rebuild" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last rebuild operation */,
  "index_density" REAL /* Average density of the index pages */,
  "index_fragmentation" REAL /* Fragmentation percentage of the index pages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_info_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables_info ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, db_admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage at the time of logging */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage at the time of logging */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O at the time of logging */,
  "read_iops" REAL /* Read I/O operations per second */,
  "write_iops" REAL /* Write I/O operations per second */,
  "query_count" INTEGER /* Number of queries executed */,
  "slow_query_count" INTEGER /* Number of slow queries (e.g., > 1 second) */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "cpu_idle" REAL /* CPU idle time as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables_info ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, optimization) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detail message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables_info ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table associated with the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., index, query optimization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the recommendation */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the recommendation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, implemented, rejected) */,
  "implemented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who implemented the recommendation */,
  "implemented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was implemented */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_recommendations_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables_info ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_recommendations_implemented_by FOREIGN KEY ("implemented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table that was maintained */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., rebuild, analyze) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the maintenance activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables_info ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_maintenance" (
  "index_maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index maintenance activity */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index being maintained */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., rebuild, analyze) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the maintenance activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the index maintenance activity in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the index maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_maintenance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES index_info ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query performance entry */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the SQL query executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query in milliseconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance was logged */,
  "query_plan" TEXT /* JSON object representing the query execution plan */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the query execution */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the query execution */,
  "rows_returned" INTEGER /* Number of rows returned by the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "max_connections" INTEGER /* Maximum number of connections allowed */,
  "timeout_settings" TEXT /* Timeout settings for queries */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database management system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "max_query_duration" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed duration for queries */,
  "maintenance_window" TEXT /* Time window for maintenance activities */,
  "log_retention_period" INTEGER /* Period for retaining logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_users" (
  "db_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database user */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database the user has access to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the database */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the database */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  "last_failed_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last failed login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "average_cpu" REAL /* Average CPU usage as a percentage */,
  "average_memory" REAL /* Average memory usage in MB */,
  "average_disk_io" REAL /* Average disk I/O operations */,
  "read_throughput" REAL /* Read throughput in bytes per second */,
  "write_throughput" REAL /* Write throughput in bytes per second */,
  "network_throughput" REAL /* Network throughput in bytes per second */,
  "query_throughput" REAL /* Query throughput in queries per second */,
  "query_latency" REAL /* Average query latency in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_db_name FOREIGN KEY ("db_name") REFERENCES database_configurations ("db_name")
)
